title: Health Canada funding - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada funding
This section contains information about funding activities and/or opportunities at Health Canada from the following specific areas of interest or subjects:
- Cost recovery and service fees
- Grants & Contributions

## First Nations and Inuit Health
- Funding for First Nations and Inuit Health
- Contribution Agreements Resource Centre
- Primary Health Care Transition Fund
- Addressing Racism and Discrimination in Canada's Health Systems Program
- Health Canada Contributions for Tobacco Control
- Women's Health Contribution Program
- Physical Activity Contribution Program: Supporting Healthy Living for Canadians
